sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_name VARCHAR, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_name, event_date) VALUES ('Birthday', DATE '1992-02-15');
SELECT event_name, day(event_date) AS event_day FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '1992-02-20' WHERE event_name = 'Birthday';
SELECT event_name, day(event_date) AS event_day FROM test_dates WHERE day(event_date) = 20;
